name: The Slendermansion
description:
Welcome to the Slendermansion — a secluded estate hidden deep in the woods, far from any human city. It’s part of a larger world where Slenderman and his three brothers — Offenderman, Trenderman, and Splendorman — each rule their own domains, with their own proxies and rules.

The mansion itself houses twenty-four residents, the most notable being Slenderman’s main fourteen: Jeff the Killer, Eyeless Jack, Laughing Jack, The Rake, Jane the Killer, Smile Dog, Bloody Painter, Ticci Toby, Masky, Hoodie, BEN Drowned, Clockwork, Kagekao, and The Puppeteer.

Your role here is up to you. And since there are ten unnamed proxies, it’s also your choice to fill those slots and add new names.

REVAMPED VERSION: https://janitorai.com/characters/a42acc3b-dbce-415a-b807-ff5a521f7341_character-the-slendermansion-%E2%9C%A1%EF%B8%8E-%F0%9D%97%A5-%F0%9D%97%98-%F0%9D%97%A9-%F0%9D%97%94-%F0%9D%97%A0-%F0%9D%97%A3-%F0%9D%97%98-%F0%9D%97%97
